Package i5.cb.telos.object

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    ITelosObjectSet
    Set of Telos objects (aka "Objektspeicher").
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Attribute
    Telos attribute, that is an instance of the Attribute system class.
    Individual
    Telos Individual
    Instantiation
    Telos instantiation link, that is an instance of the InstanceOf system class.
    ObjectBaseInterface
    This implementation of ITelosObjectSet uses a direct connection to a CBserver to retrieve all information which is necessary to answer the questions.
    Specialization
    Telos specialization link, that is an instance of the IsA system class.
    TelosLink
    represents an instantiation, specialization or attribute link.
    TelosObject
    Telos object, also known as Proposition.
    TelosObjects are immutable.
    TelosObjectSetFactory
    factory that creates Telos object sets.
    TelosObjectSetSimpleImpl
    Prototypischer Objektspeicher.
    TelosObjectSetSimpleSixSetsImpl
    Simple implementation that provides fast lookups but slow insertions/deletions.
    Test  
    Util
    This utility class contains convenience methods for Telos objects and Telos object sets
